weeks.description: Rooftop vibes, sequins, neon, main character energy

prompts.label: Sequin Dress
prompts.prompt: An elegant silver sequin mini dress with thin straps, sparkling under warm golden club lighting, smooth fabric draping, professional fashion photography, sharp focus, 8k detail
